title: Senior Software Engineer - Sonata Software - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Sonata Software - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Sonata Software, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sonata Software:
Sonata Software is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sonata Software!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
